message:
test(robot): add manual Debug impl to ResolvedRobotScope

Fixes an E0277 in `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-cli --lib` where a test
uses `.expect_err(...)` on `Result<ResolvedRobotScope, _>` and Rust
needs Debug on the Ok variant to print on unexpected success. Derive
Debug doesn't work because the struct holds a RobotDbHandle connection
wrapper that intentionally has no Debug impl; hand-roll one that skips
the DbHandle and reports the identifying fields instead. Scoped to the
test profile via finish_non_exhaustive so production display behavior
is unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
